title: ctLab: normalize Stückliste tables
description:
Goal:
Normalize Stückliste formatting in ctLab markdown articles to match ctLab/audio-pedant-291478.md.
Definition of Done:
All ctLab articles with a Stückliste use the same markdown table structure as the reference article and the changes are validated by inspection.
Notes:
Reference file: ctLab/audio-pedant-291478.md.

title: ctLab: import Heise archive articles
description:
Goal:
Download the c't Lab archive article texts and images linked from the provided Heise overview page into ./.temp/ and create markdown versions under ./ctLab/.
Definition of Done:
All discovered archive article pages from the provided link are saved locally, their images are downloaded into ./.temp/, markdown article files are created in ./ctLab/, and beads state is synced.
Notes:
Preserve source URLs in the generated markdown and avoid overwriting unrelated user changes.
